page.seoTitle: CyberSuisse Protect™ Plans — Three levels of cyber protection for SMEs
page.seoDescription: Compare the three CyberSuisse Protect™ subscription plans: Essentiel, Active and Premium. Continuous cybersecurity for Swiss SMEs — monitoring, monthly reports and strategic guidance.
page.heroSubtitle: Monthly cybersecurity tailored to your SME — from clear diagnostics to strategic guidance.
page.finalCtaText: A 15-minute conversation to understand your needs and pick the right plan.

essentiel.name: Protect™ Essentiel
essentiel.tagline: The basics: monitoring, monthly report, clear priorities.
essentiel.target: SMEs with no internal IT team getting started
features: Quarterly review by email or call

active.name: Protect™ Active
active.tagline: Monthly strategic vision and active guidance.
active.target: Growing SMEs structuring their cyber posture

premium.name: Protect™ Premium
premium.tagline: Expert advice, simulations and security roadmap.

faq.q: Can I change plans at any time?
faq.a: Yes — you can move up or down a tier month over month, with no fees.
No. All plans are monthly and can be cancelled at any time.

faq.q: Does the annual light pentest in Premium replace a full pentest?
faq.a: No. It is a light pentest for targeted reviews. For a full pentest, see our dedicated offer.

faq.q: What exactly is in the monthly report?
faq.a: An executive summary of detected risks, their business impact, and action priorities for the next 30 days.

faq.q: Do these plans include 24/7 incident response?
faq.a: No. For SOC or emergency response needs, an add-on service can be discussed.
